text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hurry, Trainer! The cafeteria is about to close!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the spring Tenno Sho, Mejiro McQueen is in
great shape.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training went off without a hitch again today, so
we decided to have a snack in the cafeteria, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt, bzzzt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? A phone call? Who on earth could it—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No, this isn't gonna cut it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I couldn't hold out in the Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen was so amazing right up to the end, but
I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I couldn't...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey... don't you think you might be training a
little too much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh... Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I thought you left awfully early for it being your
day off. I can't believe you've been training by
yourself all day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If you push yourself too hard, your body will
break down. You have a race coming up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But... I'm still not good enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family expected me to win the
Classics, but... that's not how it worked out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen flawlessly met everyone's expectations
in the Tenno Sho, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm weak... I'm not nearly good enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not strong enough, not motivated enough—I
don't have enough of anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I know how you feel. I've been by you all this
time. But wanting to win is all the more reason not
to push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...All right. Sorry for worrying you. I'll go change
and then rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Truly?! For my accomplishments?! I feel... You
have my eternal gratitude for this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell by her voice, she's talking with her
grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
...I've been watching your endeavors this entire
time. Know that your hard work is what merited
this recent achievement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, Grandmother!

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Be proud of how radiant you've become. And one
more thing.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
I am hoping you will pave a new path for our
long-established Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What? You want me... to pave a new path?

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The task will be difficult, requiring
considerable preparation.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
But I know that you'll be fine. Go forward in your
own way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-yes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So, I'm the one who is to show the illustrious Mejiro family a new path? To think Grandmother's entrusted me with such a task...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Have... Have I really? It doesn't truly feel real yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that exact moment, I spot someone coming
toward us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Was that... Grandmother just now? So, she's
picked you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: R-Ryan?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-you must have heard it all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She really expects that much from you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not surprised. You won the Tenno Sho, and
you're always so strong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You've been like that since we were kids.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um, but I don't really feel that way yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hm... You'll be fine, McQueen. I know it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You've already lived up to everyone's
expectations and showed us a perfect win at the
Tenno Sho, after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I think you're more than worthy of
being the family's head. Still!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wanna get strong too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I don't want all our family's expectations to be on you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What do you say, McQueen? We've got one
more!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
One more showdown between us! This time... at
the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose this one. I'll win for sure, and by doing
that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll prove that I'm strong enough to bear those
expectations with you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan...
choice_data_list: That's what true resolve sounds like.
That's what true resolve sounds like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...It seems so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, my resolve to shoulder the
responsibility of the Mejiro family name is being
called into question.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan said she'll prove that she's strong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: In that case, I must prove to her how strong I am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The participants in the Takarazuka Kinen are
selected by fan ballot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Just to be chosen to compete is a privilege in
itself. I hope Ryan knows that.
